decisions.title: do not add write batching
decisions.rationale: Benchmark refuted the hypothesis: p99 latency unchanged by batching. Bottleneck is fsync, not write call frequency.
evidence: benchmark: p99 unchanged, bottleneck is fsync

hypotheses.text: batching writes will cut p99 latency
hypotheses.refuting_evidence: benchmark: p99 unchanged, bottleneck is fsync
